name: over-500-char-sentence
texts: This single sentence is deliberately far longer than the five hundred character cap that the recap function enforces on its output because we need to verify that truncation happens at exactly the right boundary and that the truncated text is stripped of trailing whitespace This single sentence is deliberately far longer than the five hundred character cap that the recap function enforces on its output because we need to verify that truncation happens at exactly the right boundary and that the truncated text is stripped of trailing whitespace This single sentence is deliberately far longer than the five hundred character cap that the recap function enforces on its output because we need to verify that truncation happens at exactly the right boundary and that the truncated text is stripped of trailing whitespace and it ends here.
